$comment: Monochrome (Ink) — austere. The lead role maps to ink/grey so the deck carries no brand hue; the single accent (mustard) is the one highlight, exactly as DESIGN.md prescribes. Charts go greyscale with the focal series in ink. All hexes are already in tokens.colors.

$template.label: モノクローム / Ink
$template.use: 主張を数字と構造だけで通す硬派な資料。色相を持たず、強調はアクセント1点のみ。
